text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I've started collecting five-hundred-yen
coins. I'm saving up for a motorcycle.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Still don't know which one I want though. They're
all so damn cool.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Something American would be sweet as hell, but
soaring down the roads in a liter bike sounds
great too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hnnngh, I can't wait! I'll take you for a ride when I
finally get one!
